---
title: "Sophia Angelene Santos"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: pfp.JPG
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/sophiangelene18
    - icon: inbox-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sophiangelene@g.ucla.edu
    - text: Resume
      href: resume.pdf
toc: false
---

Hi there! My name is Sophia, and I am a recent graduate from UCLA. During my time in college, I studied Statistics and Data Science, Digital Humanities, and Business/Management. I believe that the thoughtful application of technology has the power to transform business practices, customer experience, and community well-being. I thrive in settings where I can collaborate with teams and work independently.

## Education
#### **UCLA**  
*B.S. Statistics and Data Science, Minor in Digital Humanities*  
September 2022 - March 2026

#### **College of the Canyons, Valencia**  
*Dual Enrollment Coursework*  
2020 - 2022  

#### **Canyon High School**  
*High School Diploma*  
2018 - 2022
